criteria.description: writer.go's doc comments no longer claim Append's durability discipline matches engine/catalog's literal WriteAt+Sync idiom
criteria.validation: Manual diff review of engine/wal/writer.go: confirm the phrase 'matching this repo's WriteAt+Sync durability idiom' referencing engine/catalog/file.go's FileManager.WritePage and engine/catalog/idalloc.go's IDAllocator.Next is removed/replaced.

criteria.description: Comment corrected to describe the actual plain sequential file.Write+Sync behavior
criteria.validation: Manual diff review: new comment text explicitly names sequential file.Write (header then payload) + file.Sync at current append position as the actual mechanism.
Run `go vet ./engine/wal/...` from repo root after edit; expect zero output/exit 0.
Run `gofmt -l engine/wal/` after edit; expect empty output.
git diff scoped to comment lines only, no changes to executable code, no changes to writer_test.go or other test files. Confirmed via `git diff --stat`.
